all.en: This memo summarizes the results of our recent landing page optimization test.
all.zh: 本備忘錄彙整近期登陸頁優化測試的結果。

all.en: Two design variants were compared against the existing control experience.
all.zh: 兩個設計版本與現行對照版進行了比較測試。

all.en: Variant A featured a simplified hero section with a single primary action.
all.zh: 版本 A 採用簡化的主視覺區，僅保留單一主要行動按鈕。

all.en: Variant B introduced testimonial blocks placed directly below the headline.
all.zh: 版本 B 在標題正下方加入了客戶見證區塊。

all.en: The test ran for fourteen consecutive days using equal traffic allocation.
all.zh: 測試以平均流量分配方式連續執行十四天。

all.en: Total visitor volume across the experiment reached just over ninety thousand.
all.zh: 整個實驗的訪客總量略超過九萬人次。

all.en: Variant A increased conversion rate by twelve percent relative to the control.
all.zh: 版本 A 的轉換率較對照版提升百分之十二。

all.en: Variant B increased conversion rate by seven percent over the same time period.
all.zh: 版本 B 於同期間將轉換率提升百分之七。

all.en: Statistical significance was confirmed at the ninety five percent confidence level.
all.zh: 已在百分之九十五的信賴水準下確認統計顯著性。

all.en: Average session duration also improved across both variants compared to control.
all.zh: 兩個版本相較於對照版，平均停留時間皆有改善。

all.en: Bounce rate decreased meaningfully on mobile devices in particular.
all.zh: 尤其在行動裝置上，跳出率明顯降低。

all.en: Desktop performance was less differentiated but still trended positively overall.
all.zh: 桌機端表現差異較小，但整體仍呈正向趨勢。

all.en: Segmentation by traffic source revealed strong gains from paid social channels.
all.zh: 依流量來源細分顯示，付費社群通路有顯著提升。

all.en: Organic search visitors responded more strongly to the simplified layout option.
all.zh: 自然搜尋訪客對簡化版面選項的反應更為強烈。

all.en: Heatmap analysis confirmed greater engagement above the page fold.
all.zh: 熱區分析確認在首屏範圍內互動更為熱絡。

all.en: Survey responses indicated that visitors found the new design easier to navigate.
all.zh: 問卷回應顯示訪客覺得新設計更易於瀏覽操作。

all.en: Based on these results, we recommend rolling out Variant A site wide next week.
all.zh: 依據這些結果，建議下週於全站推出版本 A。

all.en: Variant B elements may still inform future iterations of the homepage experience.
all.zh: 版本 B 的元素仍可作為未來首頁體驗迭代的參考。

all.en: A second round of testing will explore form length and field requirements.
all.zh: 第二輪測試將探討表單長度與欄位需求。

all.en: We will also evaluate the impact of new pricing presentation in upcoming sprints.
all.zh: 未來衝刺中也將評估新版定價呈現方式的影響。

all.en: Performance dashboards will be updated to monitor sustained improvement over time.
all.zh: 績效儀表板將進行更新，以監控持續改善的成效。

all.en: Please contact the growth team for raw data extracts or further analysis questions.
all.zh: 如需原始資料匯出或更多分析問題，請聯絡成長團隊。

all.en: Engineering will coordinate the production rollout during a low traffic window.
all.zh: 工程團隊將於低流量時段協調正式上線推出。

all.en: Quality assurance will validate the variant across all supported browsers first.
all.zh: 品保人員將先在所有支援瀏覽器上驗證該版本。

all.en: Tracking events will be reviewed to ensure analytics capture remains accurate.
all.zh: 將檢視追蹤事件以確保分析資料擷取維持準確。

all.en: Customer support has been briefed on the visual changes ahead of release.
all.zh: 客服團隊已於上線前接獲視覺變更的事前說明。

all.en: We will monitor key metrics daily for the first two weeks after launch.
all.zh: 上線後的前兩週我們將每日監控關鍵指標。

all.en: Any unexpected regressions will trigger an immediate review and rollback if needed.
all.zh: 任何非預期的退步都會立即啟動檢討，必要時回退版本。

all.en: Learnings from this test will feed into our optimization roadmap document.
all.zh: 本次測試的學習成果將納入我們的優化路徑圖文件。

all.en: We thank everyone who contributed to designing and shipping these variants.
all.zh: 感謝所有參與設計與交付這些版本的同仁。

all.en: A detailed appendix with charts and raw figures is attached to this memo.
all.zh: 本備忘錄附有含圖表與原始數據的詳細附錄。

all.en: Feel free to share this summary with relevant stakeholders in your organization.
all.zh: 歡迎將本摘要分享給貴組織內相關的利害關係人。
